Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) management, including advertisement parsing, application state, connections, characteristics, client operations, descriptors, devices, iBeacon, scanning, security, and services.


## Files
- **[ble_ad_parse.c](ble_ad_parse.c.md)**: Parses and manages Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) advertisement data, including service UUIDs, local names, and manufacturer-specific data.
- **[ble_ad_parse.h](ble_ad_parse.h.md)**: API for serializing and deserializing Bluetooth advertisement and scan response payloads.
- **[ble_app_support.c](ble_app_support.c.md)**: Initializes and cleans up Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) application state and resources.
- **[ble_app_support.h](ble_app_support.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for managing BLE application state, including scanning, connecting, and GATT client operations.
- **[ble_central.c](ble_central.c.md)**: Handles Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) connection events and manages connection handlers.
- **[ble_central.h](ble_central.h.md)**: Header file for managing Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) connections, including connection handlers and connection management functions.
- **[ble_characteristic.c](ble_characteristic.c.md)**: Functions to check properties of BLE characteristics, such as readability and writability.
- **[ble_characteristic.h](ble_characteristic.h.md)**: Functions for managing BLE characteristics, including UUID retrieval and property checks.
- **[ble_client.c](ble_client.c.md)**: Handles Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) client events and manages GATT service interactions.
- **[ble_client.h](ble_client.h.md)**: Header file for managing Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) client operations, including service discovery, characteristic read/write, and subscription handling.
- **[ble_descriptor.h](ble_descriptor.h.md)**: Functions for managing BLE descriptors, including getting UUIDs and characteristics, and creating or destroying descriptors.
- **[ble_device.c](ble_device.c.md)**: Header inclusion for BLE device functionality in the Pebble firmware.
- **[ble_device.h](ble_device.h.md)**: Copies known Bluetooth devices into an array, including paired and connected devices.
- **[ble_ibeacon.c](ble_ibeacon.c.md)**: Implements iBeacon advertisement data parsing and composing for Bluetooth Low Energy.
- **[ble_ibeacon.h](ble_ibeacon.h.md)**: Defines the BLEiBeacon structure and functions for parsing, creating, and managing iBeacon data.
- **[ble_scan.c](ble_scan.c.md)**: Handles Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) scan events, start, stop, and status operations.
- **[ble_scan.h](ble_scan.h.md)**: Functions and types for starting, stopping, and handling Bluetooth Low Energy advertisement scanning.
- **[ble_security.c](ble_security.c.md)**: Header file inclusion for BLE security functionality.
- **[ble_security.h](ble_security.h.md)**: Defines functions and types for managing Out-Of-Band (OOB) Bluetooth pairing in Pebble firmware.
- **[ble_service.c](ble_service.c.md)**: Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) service implementation for Pebble firmware.
- **[ble_service.h](ble_service.h.md)**: Header file for managing BLE services, including functions to get characteristics, UUIDs, and devices.
